race.comment: BOLD SECRET (2) looks well placed on best form. He was beaten at $1.65 first up at Pakenham without any real excuses but should come on plenty from that and this looks easier. His form last time in is a fair way ahead of these and we get the much better price now. FLYING CAPITAL (4) has been good in two runs to date when finding one better, both times behind impressive winners. He'll roll forward and take catching. FORWARD HO (12) is going okay this time in and will be up on speed despite a wide gate. She can figure at each way prices. JUST LIKE JAGGER (6) is a gelding by Impending on debut for the Vella yard who has been met with market support, respecting off solid jumpout form.
